overlay_notes: Costinot-Werning optimal robot tax: 2.7% ad-valorem × auto_cost 10% → automation_tax_rate = 0.0027 of the saved compensation bill
Compute-pool parity tax: effective rate 0.27 (Windfall capital ETR 26.7%) vs the 0.05 post-TCJA status quo

grounding.debt_stock: ≈ 9.2 extra years of the FY2025 federal deficit — on top of what CBO already projects
grounding.fed_deficit_flow: ≈ 1.7× the entire FY2024 defense budget, every year — on top of what CBO already projects
grounding.jobs: ≈ 1.2× the jobs lost in the Great Recession
grounding.real_gdp: ≈ 2.7 years of normal (~2%/yr) real growth, arriving all at once
grounding.revenue_flow: ≈ 0.5 full years of federal individual income-tax receipts
grounding.state_flow: ≈ 1.7× the annual NIH budget, every year
